contentPattern.structure: first block row = title band (spans all columns); rows starting with Ação/Descrição = column headers; rows starting with Subtotal/Total = summary rows; remaining rows = data
contentPattern.layout: collapsed borders, light-blue title band, gray zebra data rows, white column-header rows, 18px/10px cell padding; horizontally scrollable on mobile

suitableFor: financial/budget tables with grouped sections, column headers and subtotal/total rows
notSuitableFor: simple two-column key/value layouts (use default content or columns)
